description: This is a 3D model of a simple and modern bed, presented against a plain blue background. The bed consists of a dark brown, sturdy bed frame with four visible legs. A white mattress rests on the frame, topped with a light beige or off-white blanket that is casually draped, showing gentle folds and texture. A matching light-colored pillow is placed at the head of the bed. The overall design is very minimalist, focusing on clean lines and essential elements, suitable for a contemporary interior.
